trust.title: Trusted by project owners who want results that actually last

products.title: Three solutions that cover everything your project needs — from partitions to storage.
products.subtitle: Each solution is purpose-built for spaces that face daily moisture and heavy use — and need to look clean without constant maintenance.
products.p1_desc: Toilet cubicle partitions with SS304 hardware and precision installation — built for malls, schools, offices and public facilities. The result: complete privacy and a finish that lasts years.
products.p2_desc: Phenolic lockers with smart compartment layouts and elegant finishes — perfect for gyms, staff rooms and changing areas. No swelling, no moisture damage, ever.
products.p3_desc: Fully water-resistant cubicles with maximum privacy — engineered for daily cleaning and heavy use in sports clubs, pools and shared accommodation.

features.title: Six reasons HPL is the smartest choice for commercial projects.
features.subtitle: The real difference shows months after installation — no swelling, no rot, no ongoing maintenance headaches.
features.f1_desc: Compact phenolic panels don't absorb moisture. No swelling, no rot, no peeling — even in the most humid washrooms.
features.f2_desc: Manufactured under high pressure to resist scratches, impacts and daily friction — ideal for facilities that never stop operating.
features.f3_desc: Panels don't wobble or crack under repeated use. SS304 hardware means everything stays tight for years.
features.f4_desc: Non-porous surfaces don't harbor bacteria or absorb odors. One wipe and it looks brand new again.
features.f5_desc: Modern solid colors, wood-grain textures and premium patterns — so your partitions complement your project whether it's a hotel, school or fitness club.
features.f6_desc: Unlike traditional materials that need replacing every two years, HPL partitions keep their look and performance for years with virtually zero maintenance.

process.title: Three steps — from first contact to project handover.
process.subtitle: No complexity, no surprises. We make everything clear upfront so you can decide with full confidence.
process.s1_desc: We visit your site or review your plans — understand your project needs and recommend the right system and finish with zero obligation.
process.s2_desc: You receive a complete proposal covering dimensions, colors, hardware and timeline — everything transparent from the start.
process.s3_desc: Our team installs with precision and care, handing over a project that's ready for immediate use — backed by a quality guarantee.

item1.title: Recommendations based on your actual site
item1.description: We don't send you a generic catalog. We understand your project — its layout, moisture levels and usage type — then recommend a solution that actually fits.

item4.title: A smart investment, not a recurring expense

specs.title: Everything you need to know about HPL materials before you decide.
specs.subtitle: Practical, simplified information to help you understand the material, compare your options and choose what's best for your project.

item1.title: Material type
item1.description: HPL compact phenolic panels — made from resin layers compressed under extreme heat and pressure. The result: a solid, durable board that's fully waterproof.

item2.title: Exceptional moisture performance
item2.description: Ideal for washrooms, pools and wet areas — no swelling, no rot, no warping regardless of how high the humidity gets.

item3.title: Wide range of applications
item3.description: Bathroom partitions, urinal screens, shower cubicles, lockers, changing rooms — one material system covers every need in your project.

item4.title: Versatile design options
item4.description: Elegant solid colors, wood-look finishes and contemporary patterns — so the look integrates seamlessly with your full project identity.

item5.title: End-to-end service
item5.description: From site survey and measurement to fabrication, supply and final installation — everything from one provider, no complexity.

item6.title: One system for the whole project
item6.description: The same material serves partitions, lockers and shower cubicles — creating a consistent, professional finish across every area of your project.

faq.title: Straight answers to the questions our clients ask most
faq.q1: Why should I choose HPL over traditional materials?
faq.a1: Traditional materials like MDF and PVC swell and rot within months in humid conditions. HPL compact phenolic panels are fully resistant to water, impacts and repeated cleaning — and they maintain their appearance for years without needing replacement.
faq.q2: Can HPL partitions handle continuously wet bathrooms?
faq.a2: Absolutely. They're specifically designed for that purpose — they withstand direct water, steam and constant humidity. That's why you'll find them in the best sports clubs, hospitals and swimming pools worldwide.
faq.q3: Can I choose custom sizes and finishes for my project?
faq.a3: Of course. We customize everything to your site measurements and offer a wide range of colors and finishes so they integrate perfectly with your project's design identity.

testimonials.title: Why do project owners across Saudi Arabia trust us?
testimonials.subtitle: Because the final result speaks for itself — here are some real experiences from our clients.

items.name: Eng. Khalid Al-Otaibi
items.text: We worked with them on a bathroom partition project for a commercial building in Riyadh. The installation was incredibly clean and delivery was exactly on schedule. The material quality was excellent and the difference from traditional materials was obvious from day one.

items.name: Sarah Al-Malki
items.text: We installed HPL lockers in the changing rooms. The look is professional and maintenance is effortless. A full year of heavy daily use and the lockers haven't changed at all.

items.name: Eng. Abdullah Al-Shammari
items.text: I recommend them for any project that needs phenolic partitions. Communication is clear and comfortable, recommendations are practical and well-thought-out, and the final result always exceeds expectations.
